Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`，其中 `nums` 是范围 `[0..n - 1]` 内所有数字的一个 **排列** 。

你可以在满足条件 `nums[i] AND nums[j] == k` 的情况下交换下标 `i` 和 `j` 的元素，其中 `AND` 表示按位与操作，`k` 是一个**非负整数**。

返回可以使数组按 **非递减** 顺序排序的最大值 `k`（允许进行任意次这样的交换）。如果 `nums` 已经是有序的，返回 0。

**排列** 是数组所有元素的一种重新排列。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**nums = [0,3,2,1]

**输出：**1

**解释：**

选择 `k = 1`。交换 `nums[1] = 3` 和 `nums[3] = 1`，因为 `nums[1] AND nums[3] == 1`，从而得到一个排序后的排列：`[0, 1, 2, 3]`。

**示例 2：**

**输入：**nums = [0,1,3,2]

**输出：**2

**解释：**

选择 `k = 2`。交换 `nums[2] = 3` 和 `nums[3] = 2`，因为 `nums[2] AND nums[3] == 2`，从而得到一个排序后的排列：`[0, 1, 2, 3]`。

**示例 3：**

**输入：**nums = [3,2,1,0]

**输出：**0

**解释：**

只有当 `k = 0` 时，才能进行排序，因为没有更大的 `k` 能够满足 `nums[i] AND nums[j] == k` 的交换条件。

 

**提示：**

- `1 <= n == nums.length <= 10**5`
- `0 <= nums[i] <= n - 1`
- `nums` 是从 `0` 到 `n - 1` 的一个排列。

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  sorted_nums = nums.sort
  max_k = 0

  # For each possible k, check if we can sort the array using swaps with AND == k
  # We iterate through all possible k values from 0 to n-1
  (0...n).each do |k|
    # Create a copy of the array to perform swaps
    arr = nums.dup
    # Use a visited array to track which elements have been processed
    visited = Array.new(n, false)

    # Try to sort the array using swaps with AND == k
    sorted = true
    (0...n).each do |i|
      if visited[i]
        next
      end
      # Find the next element that can be swapped with arr[i] to get the sorted value
      target = sorted_nums[i]
      j = i
      while j < n
        if !visited[j] && (arr[i] & arr[j]) == k && arr[j] == target
          # Swap the elements
          arr[i], arr[j] = arr[j], arr[i]
          visited[i] = true
          visited[j] = true
          break
        end
        j += 1
      end
      # If no such element is found, break the loop
      if j >= n
        sorted = false
        break
      end
    end

    # If the array can be sorted with this k, update max_k
    if sorted
      max_k = k
    end
  end

  max_k
end

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  sorted_nums = nums.sort
  max_k = 0

  # For each possible k, check if we can sort the array using swaps with AND == k
  # We iterate through all possible k values from 0 to n-1
  (0...n).each do |k|
    # Create a copy of the array to perform swaps
    arr = nums.dup
    # Use a visited array to track which elements have been processed
    visited = Array.new(n, false)

    # Try to sort the array using swaps with AND == k
    sorted = true

      target = sorted_nums[i]

      if j >= n

        break
      end
    end

    # If the array can be sorted with this k, update max_k
    if sorted

    end
  end

  max_k
end

-spec solve(list()) -> integer().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Sorted = lists:sort(nums),
    MaxK = 0,

    %% Iterate through all possible k values
    lists:foldl(
        fun(K, Acc) ->
            Arr = lists:sublist(nums, N),
            Visited = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(1, N)),
            SortedOk = true,

            %% Try to sort the array using swaps with AND == K
            lists:foldl(
                fun(I, _) ->
                    case lists:member(I, [I]) of
                        true ->
                            %% Skip if already visited
                            ok;
                        false ->
                            Target = lists:nth(I, Sorted),
                            J = I,
                            Found = false,

                            %% Find the next element that can be swapped with Arr[I]
                            while_loop(J, N, Arr, Visited, Target, K, Found, I, SortedOk, Acc)
                    end
                end,
                ok,
                lists:seq(1, N)
            ),

            %% If sorted, update MaxK
            if
                SortedOk -> K;
                true -> Acc
            end
        end,
        MaxK,
        lists:seq(0, N-1)
    ).

while_loop(J, N, Arr, Visited, Target, K, Found, I, SortedOk, Acc) ->
    case J >= N of
        true ->
            %% No such element found, break
            case SortedOk of
                true ->
                    false;
                false ->
                    false
            end;
        false ->
            case lists:nth(J, Arr) of
                Target when not lists:nth(J, Visited) ->
                    %% Swap the elements
                    NewArr = lists:sublist(Arr, J-1) ++ [lists:nth(J, Arr), lists:nth(I, Arr)] ++ lists:sublist(Arr, J+1, N-J),
                    NewVisited = lists:sublist(Visited, J-1) ++ [true, true] ++ lists:sublist(Visited, J+1, N-J),
                    NewSortedOk = case lists:sort(NewArr) of
                        Sorted -> true;
                        _ -> false
                    end,
                    while_loop(J+1, N, NewArr, NewVisited, Target, K, true, I, NewSortedOk, Acc);
                _ ->
                    while_loop(J+1, N, Arr, Visited, Target, K, Found, I, SortedOk, Acc)
            end
    end.

solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Sorted = lists:sort(nums),
    MaxK = 0,

    % Iterate through all possible k values from 0 to n-1
    lists:foreach(
        fun(K) ->
            Arr = lists:sublist(nums, N),
            Visited = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(1, N)),
            SortedOK = true,

            % Try to sort the array using swaps with AND == K
            lists:foreach(
                fun(I) ->
                    case lists:nth(I, Visited) of
                        true -> ok;
                        false ->
                            Target = lists:nth(I, Sorted),
                            J = I,
                            Found = false,
                            while_loop(J, N, Arr, Visited, Target, K, Found, I, SortedOK)
                    end
                end,
                lists:seq(1, N)
            ),

            % If the array can be sorted with this K, update MaxK
            if
                SortedOK -> MaxK = K;
                true -> ok
            end
        end,
        lists:seq(0, N-1)
    ),

    MaxK.

while_loop(J, N, Arr, Visited, Target, K, Found, I, SortedOK) ->
    case J >= N of
        true ->
            SortedOK1 = false,
            if
                SortedOK1 -> ok;
                true -> ok
            end;
        false ->
            case lists:nth(J, Visited) of
                false ->
                    case (lists:nth(J, Arr) band lists:nth(J, Arr)) == K andalso lists:nth(J, Arr) == Target of
                        true ->
                            % Swap the elements
                            NewArr = swap_elements(Arr, I, J),
                            NewVisited = lists:map(
                                fun(X) -> if X == I orelse X == J -> true; true -> X end end,
                                Visited
                            ),
                            while_loop(J + 1, N, NewArr, NewVisited, Target, K, true, I, true);
                        false ->
                            while_loop(J + 1, N, Arr, Visited, Target, K, false, I, SortedOK)
                    end;
                true ->
                    while_loop(J + 1, N, Arr, Visited, Target, K, Found, I, SortedOK)
            end
    end.

swap_elements(Arr, I, J) ->
    lists:sublist(Arr, I-1) ++ [lists:nth(J, Arr), lists:nth(I, Arr)] ++ lists:sublist(Arr, J+1, length(Arr)-J).

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  sorted_nums = nums.sort
  max_k = 0

  # For each possible k, check if we can sort the array using swaps with AND == k
  # We iterate through all possible k values from 0 to n-1
  (0...n).each do |k|
    # Create a copy of the array to perform swaps
    arr = nums.dup
    # Use a visited array to track which elements have been processed
    visited = Array.new(n, false)

    # Try to sort the array using swaps with AND == k
    sorted = true
    (0...n).each do |i|
      if visited[i]
        next
      end
      # Find the next element that can be swapped with arr[i] to get the sorted value
      target = sorted_nums[i]
      j = i
      while j < n
        if !visited[j] && (arr[i] & arr[j]) == k && arr[j] == target
          # Swap the elements
          arr[i], arr[j] = arr[j], arr[i]
          visited[i] = true
          visited[j] = true
          break
        end
        j += 1
      end
      # If no such element is found, break the loop
      if j >= n
        sorted = false
        break
      end
    end

    # If the array can be sorted with this k, update max_k
    if sorted
      max_k = k
    end
  end

  max_k
end
